project_type: Python PySide6 desktop app - Darts League management
test_framework: pytest with markers (unit, integration, release_smoke); headless Qt tests skip on missing libGL
verification_instructions: 1. python -m compileall app -q  2. python -m mypy app  3. python -m pytest -q -rs  4. ruff check app/ --select F401
setup_instructions: pip install -r requirements-dev.txt (includes PySide6, openpyxl, pytest, mypy)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network. No libGL on sandbox so Qt headless UI tests are skipped. Python 3.11 default. ruff 0.15.15 available.
contribution_requirements: All UI and documentation in Russian. Brand name 'Darts Liga'. mypy clean. pytest green. Log changes to logs/ directory.
key_patterns: app/ui/ contains PySide6 views, app/services/ contains business logic, app/db/ contains SQLite schema/repositories. Tests in tests/. Planning docs in planning/. Release docs at root level (10_RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md, FAQ.txt, SECURITY.md).
directory_structure: app/ - source code (db/, domain/, services/, ui/, assets/); tests/ - pytest tests; planning/ - roadmap/state/decisions; logs/ - dev logs; scripts/ - build/release scripts; docs/ - extra documentation
